message:
Add unmount guards to UpgradeStatus and PodHealthTrend (#5008)

UpgradeStatus: add cancelled flag to the version-fetch effect so
Promise.all results are discarded when deps change or the component
unmounts, preventing stale setState calls.

PodHealthTrend: add cancelled flags to both the history-append and
history-init effects so setHistory is skipped after unmount.

Also replace magic numbers with named constants (RETRY_INTERVAL_MS,
MAX_HISTORY_POINTS, DEMO_SEED_POINTS, DEMO_INTERVAL_MS, MAX_JITTER).

Fixes #4990, #4991

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
